name: CMN Substrate
synopsis: Shared Rust library for CMN — data models, cryptographic verification, tree hashing, URI parsing, and JSON schema validation used by both Hypha and Synapse
intent: Provide the common foundation shared between Hypha (client) and Synapse (indexer): spore/mycelium data models, Ed25519 signature verification, BLAKE3 content hashing, CMN URI parsing, and spore.core.json schema validation
mutations: Extract shared logic from Synapse into Substrate — bond filtering, BFS traversal, verdict aggregation, version timestamp comparison, and self-hosted signature verification helpers
Add archive-to-tree conversion and extract-and-verify pipeline for consuming spore archives with content hash verification
Add lightweight TasteVerdictRecord for client-side verdict caching without full cryptographic taste manifests
Improve tree hashing performance by using HashSet for NFC filename collision detection
Reorder taste schema and model fields to alphabetical consistency (domain, key before target_uri)

bonds.reason: Implements core CMN data structures and verification logic per the specification
